cases.description: One medium nested object with strings, numbers, booleans, arrays, and maps.
cases.name: profile

results.name: bunker
results.note: Uses bunker(value), so Bunker discovers and embeds the schema on each encode.

results.name: bunker-schema
results.note: Passes an explicit schema to bunker(value, schema), so Bunker does not discover the schema during encode.

results.name: msgpackr-records
results.note: Uses msgpackr Packr with shared record structures enabled.

results.name: flatbuffers-flexbuffers
results.note: Uses the FlatBuffers package's FlexBuffers object encoder.
